THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NATIONAL AUTOMOBILE AND CASUALTY INSURANCE COMPANY BALLESTRASSSE BAIL BONDS $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $83.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,083.00
LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 02, MOTION TO VACATE SUMMARY JUDGMENT, CALENDAR OF NOV-27-1996, DENIED

IT IS ORDERED THAT THE COLLECTION AND EXECUTION OF THE SUMMARY JUDGMENT IN THIS CASE IS STAYED THROUGH AND UNTIL 2-28-97 - GRANTED - DEPT. 1 - JUDGE DESMOND. FILED BY DEFENDANT BALLESTRASSSE BAIL BONDS
